testsuite.name: TestSemantic_Analysis
testsuite.system-err: [OperatorError] Operator '+' requires same numeric type on both sides, got 'INT' and 'FLOAT' [ScopeError] 'x' is used but not declared [MissingConditionError] Condition of 'if' must be BOOL, got 'INT' [CollectionError] Collection 'P' is already defined [TypeError] Cannot assign value of type 'STRING' to variable 'x' of type 'INT' [ArgumentError] Function 'add' expects 1 argument(s), got 2 [ReturnError] Function must return 'INT' but returns 'BOOL'
